scripts.dev: bun run toolchain:check && node scripts/dev-runner.ts dev
scripts.dev:server: bun run toolchain:check && node scripts/dev-runner.ts dev:server
scripts.dev:web: bun run toolchain:check && node scripts/dev-runner.ts dev:web
scripts.dev:marketing: bun run toolchain:check && turbo run dev --filter=@t3tools/marketing
scripts.dev:desktop: bun run toolchain:check && node scripts/dev-runner.ts dev:desktop
scripts.start: bun run toolchain:check && turbo run start --filter=t3
scripts.start:desktop: bun run toolchain:check && turbo run start --filter=@t3tools/desktop
scripts.start:desktop:main-state: bun run toolchain:check && cd apps/desktop && T3CODE_STATE_DIR="$HOME/.t3/userdata" bun run start
scripts.start:marketing: bun run toolchain:check && turbo run preview --filter=@t3tools/marketing
scripts.start:mock-update-server: bun run toolchain:check && bun run scripts/mock-update-server.ts
scripts.build: bun run toolchain:check && turbo run build
scripts.build:marketing: bun run toolchain:check && turbo run build --filter=@t3tools/marketing
scripts.build:desktop: bun run toolchain:check && turbo run build --filter=@t3tools/desktop --filter=t3
scripts.typecheck: bun run toolchain:check && turbo run typecheck
scripts.test: bun run toolchain:check && turbo run test
scripts.test:desktop-smoke: bun run toolchain:check && turbo run smoke-test --filter=@t3tools/desktop
scripts.build:contracts: bun run toolchain:check && turbo run build --filter=@t3tools/contracts
scripts.dist:desktop:dmg: bun run toolchain:check && node scripts/build-desktop-artifact.ts --platform mac --target dmg
scripts.dist:desktop:dmg:arm64: bun run toolchain:check && node scripts/build-desktop-artifact.ts --platform mac --target dmg --arch arm64
scripts.dist:desktop:dmg:x64: bun run toolchain:check && node scripts/build-desktop-artifact.ts --platform mac --target dmg --arch x64
scripts.dist:desktop:linux: bun run toolchain:check && node scripts/build-desktop-artifact.ts --platform linux --target AppImage --arch x64
scripts.dist:desktop:win: bun run toolchain:check && node scripts/build-desktop-artifact.ts --platform win --target nsis
scripts.dist:desktop:win:arm64: bun run toolchain:check && node scripts/build-desktop-artifact.ts --platform win --target nsis --arch arm64
scripts.dist:desktop:win:x64: bun run toolchain:check && node scripts/build-desktop-artifact.ts --platform win --target nsis --arch x64
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist apps/*/dist-electron packages/*/dist .turbo apps/*/.turbo packages/*/.turbo
